displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Dreams of General Grievous
synopsis: "The Clone Wars: The Dreams of General Grievous" is a six-page webcomic in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series that takes place prior to the Star Wars: The Clone Wars television series episode "Lair of Grievous." Posted on StarWars.com on December 10, 2008, it was written by Pablo Hidalgo and illustrated and lettered by Katie Cook, Grant Gould, Thomas Hodges, and Jeffery Carlisle. "The Dreams of General Grievous" shows the cyborg General Grievous thinking about his past as a Kaleesh warrior as he travels to his castle on the third moon of Vassek.
